programs.desc: In Israel, Kate unearths icing sugar's secret ingredient. Jimmy grapples with a team of wrestlers who swear by a mysterious yoghurt called skyr. And Matt deep-dives for edible seaweed.

programs.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programs.desc: In Gloucestershire, Simon O'Brien converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry Cole turns a quick profit on a tractor.

programs.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programs.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions. Is there profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast-iron fire guard and old wooden workshop clamps.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: James and Kim Hodgson hope that their love of luxury will impress their guests at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire. But they receive some home truths in their feedback.
